gelato – thca flower 14g click here for coa gelato is like the cool kid in the cannabis world. it’s also known as gelato 33 or larry bird (gelato 41). it’s the perfect mix of two incredible parent strains sunset sherbet and thin mint girl scout cookies. gelato is the best of both worlds! it’s an indica dominant hybrid—56 % indica 44% sativa—which means it offers relaxation while also having that sativa focused kick. whether you’re new to cannabis or a seasoned pro it’s the kind of strain that leaves you wanting more every single time! strain effects euphoric high uplifting creative relaxing effects happy focused thc level the thc level for this indica dominant hybrid is 14.41%. its mildy high thc content can be attributed to the densely populated trichomes adding to the potency of this excellent cannabis bud. the strain’s potency adds to its appeal for cannabis enthusiasts. aroma & flavor profile gelato is a sweet and fruity mix with a hint of gas drawing you closer with its irresistible aroma. it has been described as a scoop of sherbet reminiscent of blueberry and orange flavors. as you inhale it’s like entering a world filled with lavender citrus and berries! when you break apart the nugs and light up a subtle woody note enhances your overall smoking experience. it’s like taking a flavorful journey with every puff! appearance at first glance gelato has slightly dense dark purple buds with super bright pistil orange hairs covered in thick crystal like trichomes. trichomes are the good stuff containing cannabinoids and terpenes that give gelato its high quality distinct flavor and potency! terpene profile limonene limonene is responsible for the weed strains’ berry citrus and fruity flavors. limonene creates an uplifting and euphoric feeling in cannabis. myrcene myrcene gives an earthy and musky aroma complementing and collaborating with the other terpenes. this terpene is considered one of the most relaxing in how it affects people. myrcene is found in all indica strains and offers relaxation and aids muscle spasms and chronic pain. caryophyllene caryophyllene terpene is known for its spicy and pepper flavor and aroma. caryophyllene offers anti inflammatory and anti anxiety effects that can contribute to the therapeutic and sensory effects. where to buy gelato thca strain online you can find the legendary gelato strain here at bay smokes !
